message:
Welcome back! 👋

We were making great progress on your MSPM33C321A derivative MCU. Here's a quick recap: we completed **Stages 1–5** of the full 6-stage MCU factory flow — generating all intermediate artifacts (device spec, memory map, interrupt map, padframe requirements, SoC config, 97-item verification checklist, 21 scenario testbenches, full RTL generation, and simulation verification with 21/21 tests passing). The verification review returned a clean **PROCEED_TO_PNR** verdict with all derivative deltas confirmed (512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, I2C2 added at `0x4000_B000` / IRQ 11, ADC reduced to 1 instance).

We were mid-way through **Stage 6 (Physical Design / PnR)** — the LibreLane wrapper hardening had completed synthesis (90,977 cells), floorplan, PDN, placement, and global routing, and had launched Detailed Routing (DRT). It looks like the DRT process did not survive the session restart, so that will need to be re-launched.

Would you like to **continue with Stage 6 (re-run the DRT / PnR flow)** to complete the physical design and produce the final GDS? Or would you prefer to **switch focus** — for example, reviewing the intermediate artifacts already produced (spec, memory map, verification dashboard, etc.) or discussing any aspect of the design in more detail?

args.content:
Welcome back! 👋

We were making great progress on your MSPM33C321A derivative MCU. Here's a quick recap: we completed **Stages 1–5** of the full 6-stage MCU factory flow — generating all intermediate artifacts (device spec, memory map, interrupt map, padframe requirements, SoC config, 97-item verification checklist, 21 scenario testbenches, full RTL generation, and simulation verification with 21/21 tests passing). The verification review returned a clean **PROCEED_TO_PNR** verdict with all derivative deltas confirmed (512KB flash, 128KB SRAM, I2C2 added at `0x4000_B000` / IRQ 11, ADC reduced to 1 instance).

We were mid-way through **Stage 6 (Physical Design / PnR)** — the LibreLane wrapper hardening had completed synthesis (90,977 cells), floorplan, PDN, placement, and global routing, and had launched Detailed Routing (DRT). It looks like the DRT process did not survive the session restart, so that will need to be re-launched.

Would you like to **continue with Stage 6 (re-run the DRT / PnR flow)** to complete the physical design and produce the final GDS? Or would you prefer to **switch focus** — for example, reviewing the intermediate artifacts already produced (spec, memory map, verification dashboard, etc.) or discussing any aspect of the design in more detail?
